query_title: Family Guy Presents: It's a Trap!

recommendations.title: Family Guy Presents: Blue Harvest
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: With the Griffins stuck at home during a blackout, Peter tells the story of "Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope".
recommendations.director: Peter Shin, James Purdum, Dominic Polcino

recommendations.title: Family Guy Presents: Something, Something, Something, Dark Side
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Peter makes good on another power outage at home by retelling "Star Wars Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back".
recommendations.director: Peter Shin, James Purdum, Dominic Polcino

recommendations.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Family, Comedy, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: When Grizz, Panda, and Ice Bear's love of food trucks and viral videos get out of hand, the brothers are now chased away from their home and embark on a trip to Canada, where they can live in peace.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Star Wars
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction, Adventure, TV Movie, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb become the galaxy's unlikeliest last hope when they must return the Death Star plans to the Rebel Alliance.

recommendations.title: Ultraman: Rising
recommendations.overview: A star athlete reluctantly returns home to take over his father's duties as Ultraman, shielding Tokyo from giant monsters as he becomes a legendary hero.

recommendations.title: Teen Beach 2
recommendations.overview: When characters from the movie musical “Wet Side Story” get stuck in the real world, teens Brady and Mack must find a way to return them home.

recommendations.title: La Maison en Petits Cubes
recommendations.overview: La Maison en Petits Cubes tells the story of a grandfather's memories as he adds more blocks to his house to stem the flooding waters.

recommendations.title: Transformers Prime: Beast Hunters - Predacons Rising
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Autobots, Decepticons, Predaking and Predacons form an unlikely alliance to battle a resurrected Unicron.
recommendations.director: Vinton Heuck, Scooter Tidwell, Todd Waterman

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb get trapped in an alternate dimension where the evil Doofenshmirtz rules the tri-state area. They must find a way back home with the help of their pet platypus named Perry, who they discover is a secret agent.

recommendations.title: Invader Zim: Enter the Florpus
recommendations.genres: Family, Animation, Comedy, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: ZIM discovers his almighty leaders never had any intention of coming to Earth and he loses confidence in himself for the first time in his life, which is the big break his human nemesis, Dib has been waiting for.
recommendations.director: Jenny Goldberg, Jake Wyatt, Jhonen Vasquez
